description: ULV runtime mock 驗證：整合 modular viewer 與 Knowledge Lab viewer，使用「真實內容」驗證 ULV runtime contract 是否真能被承接，作為 Flutter transfer 的唯一 gate。

tasks.desc: Verify primary surface mapping (dialogue/video/article) with real lesson build artifacts in modular viewer.
Verify support detail surface mapping (grammar/pattern/usage/vocab) with real Knowledge Lab build artifacts in modular viewer.
Verify anchor, support panel, and selection state coordination across real multi-surface content.
Verify fail-soft behavior for missing data and reserved-slot (vocab) at the adapter boundary.
Verify adapter resolution order for legacy fields (zh_tw/en) vs. i18n-first contract.
Verify activity surfaces co-existence (practice_card/review_card) with ULV shell boundary.
